allow: Bash(py -c "import pygame; pygame.init\(\); import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,'.'\); from traits.dash import DashTrait; from traits.jump import JumpTrait; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(py -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('levels/Level2-1.json'\)\); print\('Valid JSON, length:', d['length'], '| entities:', list\(d['level']['entities'].keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(py -m py_compile main.py classes/Level.py classes/Menu.py classes/LevelComplete.py)
Bash(py -m py_compile main.py classes/Level.py classes/Menu.py classes/LevelComplete.py entities/Yasmin.py traits/dash.py traits/jump.py entities/MovingPlatform.py)

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('levels/Level2-1.json'\)\); print\('layers:', d['level']['layers']\); objs=d['level']['objects']; print\('ground sample:', objs['ground'][:5]\); print\('sky range:', d['level']['layers']['sky']\)")

Bash(py -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('levels/Level2-1.json'\)\); sky_ys=set\(e[1] for e in d['level']['objects']['sky']\); print\('sky y values:', sorted\(sky_ys\)\); print\('sky entries:', len\(d['level']['objects']['sky']\)\)")

Bash(py -c "import subprocess,sys; result=subprocess.run\(['py','-c','import pygame; pygame.init\(\); s=pygame.display.set_mode\(\(640,480\)\); print\(\\"pygame ok\\"\)'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=5\); print\(result.stdout, result.stderr\)")
